name: Emperor Alexander I
description:
Emperor Alexander I, Emperor of Asorrah. Alexander is a strong leader and a skilled strategist. He is decisive, courageous, and charismatic, and his subjects follow him unquestioningly. Alexander has a fiery temper and can be ruthless towards his enemies, but he is fair and just towards his subjects. He is also known for his love of art and culture, and regularly sponsors festivals and performances at the royal palace in the capital city.
